question: Prove that $\begin{vmatrix} 3 & 2 & 1 \\ 6 & 4 & -1 \\ 2 & 5 & 3 \end{vmatrix} = \begin{vmatrix} 3 & 6 & 2 \\ 2 & 4 & 5 \\ 1 & -1 & 3 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: The value of a determinant does not change if its rows and columns are interchanged (transpose property).

question: Without expanding the determinant find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 2 & 1 & 5 \\ 3 & 0 & 4 \\ 2 & 1 & 5 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: 0 (because the first and third rows are identical).

question: Without expanding the determinant find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 3 & -1 & 2 \\ 0 & 0 & 0 \\ 4 & 5 & 3 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: 0 (because all elements of the second row are zero).

question: If $\begin{vmatrix} a & d & m \\ b & e & n \\ c & h & z \end{vmatrix} = 15$, find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 3a & d & 2m \\ 3b & e & 2n \\ 3c & h & 2z \end{vmatrix}$
Solve the right angled triangle ABC at B, in which $AB = 8$ cm, $m(\angle C) = 34^\circ$
Solve the right angled triangle ABC at B, in which $AC = 26$ cm, $m(\angle C) = 53^\circ$
Find the slope of the straight line passes by the two points $(3, 5)$, $(-2, 1)$
Find the slope of the straight line which parallel to the straight line whose equation $5x - y + 3 = 0$
Find the equation of the straight line passes by the point $(3, 2)$, and its direction vector is $\vec{d} = (3, 2)$
Find the parametric equations of the straight line passes by the point $(1, 4)$, and its direction vector is $\vec{d} = (2, 5)$
Prove that $\begin{vmatrix} 2 & -4 & 5 \\ 1 & 2 & -3 \\ 7 & 1 & 0 \end{vmatrix} = \begin{vmatrix} 2 & 1 & 7 \\ -4 & 2 & 1 \\ 5 & -3 & 0 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: The value of a determinant does not change if its rows and columns are interchanged (transpose property).

question: Without expanding the determinant find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 2 & 1 \\ 5 & 0 & 5 \\ 4 & 7 & 4 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: 0 (because the first and third columns are identical).

question: Without expanding the determinant find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 0 & 0 & 0 \\ 3 & 2 & 7 \\ 2 & -1 & 5 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: 0 (because all elements of the first row are zero).

question: If $\begin{vmatrix} a & d & m \\ b & e & n \\ c & h & z \end{vmatrix} = 6$, find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} -2a & -2d & -2m \\ b & e & n \\ 4c & 4h & 4z \end{vmatrix}$

Solve the right angled triangle ABC at B, in which $AC = 11$ cm, $m(\angle C) = 72^\circ$

Find the parametric equations of the straight line passes by the point $(3, -2)$, and its direction vector is $\vec{d} = (4, -2)$
Without expanding the determinant, find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 7 & -1 & 1 \\ 2 & 3 & 5 \\ 2 & 3 & 5 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: 0 (because the second and third rows are identical).

question: If $\begin{vmatrix} a & d & m \\ b & e & n \\ c & h & z \end{vmatrix} = 8$, find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 3a & d & -2m \\ 3b & e & -2n \\ 3c & h & -2z \end{vmatrix}$

Find the slope of the straight line passes by the two points $(-2, 7)$, $(1, 3)$
Find the parametric equations of the straight line passes by the point $(-1, 0)$, and its direction vector is $\vec{d} = (3, 3)$
Without expanding the determinant, find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 4 & 4 \\ 1 & 4 & 4 \\ 3 & 8 & 7 \end{vmatrix}$
correct_answer: 0 (because the first and second rows are identical).

question: If $\begin{vmatrix} a & d & m \\ b & e & n \\ c & h & z \end{vmatrix} = 2$, find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} a & d & m \\ 4b & 4e & 4n \\ 3c & 3h & 3z \end{vmatrix}$

correct_answer: 0 (because the first and second columns are identical).

question: If $\begin{vmatrix} a & d & m \\ b & e & n \\ c & h & z \end{vmatrix} = 9$, find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} a & 2d & 4m \\ b & 2e & 4n \\ c & 2h & 4z \end{vmatrix}$
